patches.hypothesis: The bug is caused by accessing an array index that is out of bounds. This happens when the mapping index is greater than or equal to the length of the values array, indicating an inconsistent record.

The bug occurs because the method does not check if the index is within the bounds of the values array before accessing it, leading to an ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when the index is out of range.
patches.changes:
- return index != null ? values[index.intValue()] : null;
+ if (index != null && index >= 0 && index < values.length) { return values[index.intValue()]; } else { throw new IllegalArgumentException("Inconsistent record: index out of bounds"); }
patches.diff:
- return index != null ? values[index.intValue()] : null;
+ if (index != null && index >= 0 && index < values.length) { return values[index.intValue()]; } else { throw new IllegalArgumentException("Inconsistent record: index out of bounds"); }
